chapter_title.en: Chapter on Advance Payment in Food, Animals, and Other Goods

text: 3940 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنْ حَدِيدِ بْنِ حَكِيمٍ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ يَشْتَرِي اَلْجُلُودَ مِنَ اَلْقَصَّابِ فَيُعْطِيهِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ شَيْئاً مَعْلُوماً فَقَالَ "لاَ بَأْسَ بِهِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3940 - It is narrated from Hadid bin Hakim, who said:
I said to Abu Abdillah (as): "A man buys hides from a butcher and pays him a fixed amount every day."
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in that."
